items.contextEn: No one applied EXCEPT (FOR) a single intern from finance.
Apart from a broken hinge, the suitcase survived the trip.
All tickets sold, SAVING two seats held for staff.
We learned the news BY talking to locals at the marina.
Files arrived VIA a secure courier instead of cloud upload.
Funds came THROUGH a cooperative that pooled neighbourhood savings.
Smoke was routed BY MEANS OF narrow ducts carved in stone.
The archive reopened WITH THE HELP OF volunteer cataloguers.
Everyone gets checked in, IRRESPECTIVE OF rank or nationality.
The pilot chose to delay, REGARDLESS OF tight slot times.
She chose captions RATHER THAN dubbing every interview.
We could cancel; INSTEAD , we lengthened rehearsals.
Use reusable cups INSTEAD OF foam at the festival gate.
Several risks arose, IN PARTICULAR delayed permits near the wetland.
Trains slowed, PARTICULARLY during the morning ice storm.
Crowds cheered, ESPECIALLY when the understudy took the lead.
Several firms backed out; NOTABLY , the largest logistics partner withdrew.
We need clarity, SPECIFICALLY on overtime caps for freelancers.
Costs doubled; THAT IS , we underestimated hardware swaps.
Two wards stayed open, namely east and harbour intake.
Funds never cleared; IN OTHER WORDS , the subsidy never existed.
Toronto froze rents; LIKEWISE , Montreal capped renewals quietly.
Junior staff unionized; SIMILARLY , freelancers drafted a pact.
Critics feared apathy; IN FACT voters queued before sunrise.
Costs looked steep; INDEED auditors later called them understated.
The venue seemed empty; ACTUALLY backstage was packed tight.
He was not careless; ON THE CONTRARY , every chart was annotated.
Logistics stalled for weeks; AS FOR PR, aides stayed oddly silent.
Budgets soar on marketing; WHEN IT COMES TO training, pennies appear.
We argued ABOUT hazard pay long after payroll closed.
A memo arrived CONCERNING expired credentials for inspectors.
IN SUMMARY , every gate failed simultaneously at shift change.
TO SUM UP , we need cleaner logs before auditors return.
Plans looked solid EXCEPT THAT permits never left the clerk's inbox.
Nobody objected SAVE THAT one elder cited tradition quietly.
Ticket sales lagged all month; HOWEVER , the finale sold out.
Warnings flashed nightly; STILL , crews kept welding without pause.
Rural inventories shrank IN CONTRAST TO coastal mega-warehouses.
UNLIKE rivals, they kept staffed hotlines round the clock.
Shipments stalled inland; THEREFORE , wholesalers shrank palettes.
Energy dipped; MOREOVER , oxygen sensors stayed oddly stable.
BESIDES the usual permits, climbers needed tribal consent.
Judges debated upstairs; MEANWHILE clerks rewrote subpoenas hurriedly.
Several codes failed—for example redundant brake sensors froze nightly.
Flights diverted BECAUSE OF crosswinds over the apron.
Parades stalled DUE TO flash flooding downtown.
The hall grew SO tense THAT moderators halted questions early.
Submit IDs by dusk; OTHERWISE , security rejects every badge.
Curators toned lights SO THAT pigments would not fade prematurely.
They sealed the rink AFTER hoses finally stopped leaking backstage.
Save checkpoints BEFORE migrating any shared databases overnight.
He paced AS IF the verdict already hung in smoky air overhead.
Budgets froze mid-year GIVEN THAT every department missed targets.
We trusted the dossier FOR three editors corroborated it silently.
Reviewers flagged typos AND insisted on sharper data tables.
Floors gleamed freshly BUT corners still smelled of mildew thickly.
Deliver overnight pallets OR consolidate them to blunt freight shocks.
Rover telemetry looked idle YET spectrometers still sampled dust calmly.
The highway vanished under foam SO morning drivers crawled blindly.
He neither signed NOR faxed dissent before the quorum adjourned.
Seal the flange THEN torque every bolt slowly clockwise afterward.
She won NOT ONLY the sprint BUT ALSO the hurdles days later calmly.
BOTH auditors AND interns flagged discrepancies quietly overnight.
EITHER reschedule panels OR postpone vendor demos until Monday noon.
NEITHER hosts NOR guests breached the blackout agreement publicly.
ALTHOUGH storm bells rang, conductors kept boarding calmly.
EVEN THOUGH sirens tightened, scouts kept surveying slowly upward.
They flew DESPITE THE FACT THAT every advisory warned turbulence thickly overhead.
Rallies continued DESPITE flood warnings scrolling downtown screens constantly.
Funds arrived NOTWITHSTANDING prior freezes on escrow accounts oddly.
Briefings stalled BECAUSE interpreters arrived late backstage quietly.
NOW THAT guidance published openly, auditors circled spreadsheets nervously.
